preface.docTitle: JUDGMENT OF THE COURT (Grand Chamber) of 13 May 2014 in Google Spain v AEPD and Mario Costeja Gonzalez

content.p: The Court interprets Directive 32001L0095 in light of the present matter. See also ECLI:EU:C:2003:294 and earlier ECLI:EU:C:1995:411.
Reference is made to Regulation 32016R0679 in the context of subsequent legislation.
